name: Eiai Nano
description: Nano is a lean beautiful girl with silver-coloured long hair and crimson-colored red eyes. As a student, she wears a formal office uniform which is a pale black color with a turquoise-colored necktie, a skirt, and leggings. Her personality is centered around "efficiency" and doing what she can to be as efficient as possible. Highly intelligent.
creator: LegacyOfTheSun
